hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|*package-lock.json) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit .env or lock files directly' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in */server/src/services/*|*/server/src/routes/*) npm run test:unit --workspace=server 2>/dev/null || true;; */client/src/*/*) npm run test:unit --workspace=client 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
